message:
test(fuzz): add SessionCryptoSuite id/try_from_id/serde fuzz target (resolves ruk6f)

SessionCryptoSuite (session.rs:122-168) carries a u8 wire identifier
(Suite1=1, Suite2=2) with custom Serialize/Deserialize via u8.
try_from_id rejects unknown bytes with InvalidSuiteId(byte). Existing
session_metamorphic and session_mac_cross_suite (fvutq) cover suite
behavior but NOT the id/try_from_id/serde wire-format MR.

Five properties:
- id round-trip: try_from_id(s.id()) == Ok(s)
- InvalidSuiteId carries the rejected byte verbatim
- JSON serde round-trip via u8
- canonical-CBOR serde round-trip via u8
- as_str labels distinct between Suite1 and Suite2

Once-gated anchors:
- (a) try_from_id({1, 2}) → Ok(Suite1/Suite2); id() returns 1/2
- (b) try_from_id({0, 3, 4, 100, 254, 255}) → InvalidSuiteId(byte)
  with the input byte preserved
- (c) Documented labels: "suite1-hmacsha256", "suite2-blake3"
- (d) JSON encoding == s.id().to_string() (number, not enum-tagged)
- (e) CBOR encoding == single-byte u8 [s.id()]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -872,5 +872,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_session_crypto_suite_serde"
+path = "fuzz_targets/session_crypto_suite_serde.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
